Antarctic Seafloor Annotated Imagery Database - Classification Guide Mobile species classification catalog 0.1 Brachiopoda 0.2 Crustacea 0.3 Echinoderms 0.4 Fish, Rays & Skates 0.5 Jellies 0.6 Molluscs 0.7 Seaspiders 0.8 Worms 0.9 Unidentified classifications

Antarctic Seafloor Annotated Imagery Database - Classification Guide Edited by Jan Jansen 2026-03-03 Mobile species classification catalog This Classification Catalog shows example images for all labels used in the exhaustive search for mobile species in the Antarctic Seafloor Annotated Imagery Database (AS-AID). This catalog represents a snapshot of the database at the time of publication of the associated data-paper. The labels used are based on the Australian Morphospecies Catalog, which is an extension of the CATAMI classification scheme. For more information, the CATAMI paper can be found under this link Up to 16 randomly selected images are presented for each classification, alongside a table with the following information: Found in campaigns: a list of all campaigns in AS-AID in which this organism has been detected Total annotations: the total number of annotations for this label Please direct any enquiries, questions or
